 pi v0.74.1
 escape interrupt · ctrl+c/ctrl+d clear/exit · / commands · ! bash · ctrl+o more
 Press ctrl+o to show full startup help and loaded resources.

 Pi can explain its own features and look up its docs. Ask it how to use or extend Pi.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

> summarize this repo in one sentence

Murder is a local-first harness for coordinating multiple coding agents through
tmux, SQLite-backed state, and a Textual TUI.

> list two parser risks

Two risks:
- confusing live input/status chrome with conversation turns
- treating model-rendered shell prompts as user prompts

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
/home/user/Documents/code/murder (main)
0.0%/1.0M (auto)                             (deepseek) deepseek-v4-flash • high
